name: Folio Legal Workspace & Automation API
what_it_does: Folio REST API for real estate legal workspace and closing automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage real estate transaction and closing workflows, handle title and escrow management, access document generation and e-signature workflows, retrieve transaction timeline and milestone tracking, manage buyer, seller, and agent communications, handle wire transfer and disbursement tracking, access compliance and regulatory workflow management, retrieve closing cost and HUD-1/ALTA settlement statement data, manage trust account and escrow accounting, and integrate transaction workflows with MLS, CRM, and lender platforms.
use_cases: Managing real estate closing workflows from transaction coordination agents
Tracking title and escrow milestones from real estate operations agents
Handling document generation and signing from closing automation agents
Integrating closing data with lender platforms from real estate finance agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential closing and title focus
Real estate brokerage without title and closing workflow needs
Non-real estate legal without transaction and escrow focus
best_when: A title company, real estate attorney, or closing agent using Folio wants AI agents to automate transaction coordination, document management, closing workflows, escrow accounting, and stakeholder communication.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Real estate closing involves large financial transactions — wire fraud is a major risk. Escrow disbursement automation must have strict controls. Title and closing data includes sensitive personal financial information. Automated wire transfer instructions must be verified independently of email communications.

auth.notes: Folio uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with transaction, document, and financial scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for transaction milestone events. Integrations with MLS, lenders, and real estate platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — title company subscription pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2015. Real estate transaction and title company automation platform. Used by title agents, real estate attorneys, and closing companies. Strong automation for residential real estate transactions. Transaction coordination platform with integration ecosystem. Competes with Qualia and SoftPro for title company platforms.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Real estate wire fraud — NEVER automate wire transfer instructions without independent verification
Escrow disbursement automation requires strict approval workflow — errors create legal liability
No public MCP server — API key and OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Closing disclosure and settlement statement data must match lender-approved terms
Title insurance underwriting data — must comply with RESPA and state title insurance regulations
Wire fraud is the #1 real estate closing crime — implement out-of-band verification for all wire instructions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate closing and escrow data. SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. Wire fraud prevention critical.

security_score_components.security_notes: Title closing and escrow data. SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. Wire fraud risk extremely high.
